Our Process

All of our projects follow a clearly defined process

1. Discovery
2. Architecture
3. Build & Test
4. Deploy
5. Scale
6. Staff Aug
Discovery & System Audit
We map your current systems, identify automation potential, and define the AI opportunity with evidence.
1
Business process mapping
Understanding every workflow that could be enhanced or replaced by AI.
2
Data & infrastructure audit
Evaluating what data exists, where it lives, and how we can leverage it.
3
ROI scoping
Defining measurable success metrics before a single line of code is written.
AI Architecture Design
Full technical blueprint — model selection, data pipelines, and integration architecture.
1
Model & stack selection
Choosing the right LLMs, frameworks, and infrastructure for your use case.
2
Integration architecture
Mapping how AI plugs into your existing systems, APIs, and data flows.
Build, Train & Test
Build, fine-tune, and rigorously test against real-world scenarios before any deployment.
1
Agile development sprints
Weekly deliverables with full client visibility at every milestone.
2
Quality assurance
Stress testing, edge case handling, and performance benchmarking.
Production Deployment
Zero-disruption deployment with full monitoring and live handover.
1
Zero-downtime launch
Full rollback capability and real-time monitoring from go-live.
Monitor & Scale
Post-launch monitoring, model retraining, and continuous improvement.
1
Performance dashboards
Real-time visibility into how the AI system performs against your KPIs.
2
Continuous improvement
Model retraining and feature expansion as your data and needs grow.
AI Staff Augmentation
Need AI engineers without the overhead of full-time hiring? We embed our specialists directly into your team — on-demand, fast to deploy, and productive from day one.
1
Embed AI Engineers
Senior LLM, ML, and backend engineers plugged into your workflows, tools, and team culture.
2
Scale Up Fast
Add the right capacity exactly when you need it — expand your team rapidly to match growing demand.
3
Immediate Productivity
Our engineers are pre-vetted, AI-native, and delivering value within days — not months.
